wiki_catalogs.name: Project Overview
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive content for the Stk Table Vue project overview section. Explain the purpose of this high-performance virtual table component library, its core value proposition for real-time data display, and its dual Vue 2.7/3.x compatibility. Document the project's architecture philosophy, key differentiators from other table components, and target use cases. Include installation instructions, basic usage examples, and links to official documentation. Provide an overview of supported features including virtual scrolling, highlighting system, and advanced column management. Address the project's maturity, community support, and roadmap direction.

wiki_catalogs.name: Table Props
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for StkTable component props. Document all table-level props including data binding, configuration options, and behavior controls. Cover essential props like columns, dataSource, pagination, sorting, and virtual scrolling settings. Include detailed descriptions of each prop's purpose, accepted data types, default values, and practical usage examples. Document advanced configuration options like tree data settings, highlight configurations, and performance optimization props. Provide TypeScript interface definitions and type information for each prop. Include common prop combinations and their effects on table behavior.

wiki_catalogs.name: Column Management
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for column management features in Stk Table Vue. Detail column configuration options including width management, alignment settings (left, center, right), and responsive behavior. Document multi-level header implementation with fixed column support and leaf column configurations. Explain column sizing strategies, automatic width fitting, and percentage-based layouts. Include practical examples showing column definition syntax, dynamic width adjustments, and complex header hierarchies. Cover responsive design considerations and mobile-friendly column behaviors.

wiki_catalogs.name: Virtual Scrolling
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for virtual scrolling implementation in Stk Table Vue. Detail vertical virtual scrolling with fixed row heights, horizontal virtual scrolling for wide datasets, and auto-height virtual scrolling for dynamic content. Explain the underlying algorithm, performance benefits, memory management, and configuration options. Document viewport calculation, item rendering optimization, and scroll position tracking. Include practical examples showing implementation patterns, performance comparisons with standard table rendering, and best practices for optimal user experience. Address common issues like scroll position restoration, keyboard navigation support, and integration with other table features.

wiki_catalogs.name: Highlighting System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the highlighting system covering row and cell highlighting mechanisms. Document the HighlightConfig interface and its properties including duration and FPS settings. Explain the setHighlightDimRow and setHighlightDimCell methods for programmatic highlighting. Cover CSS-based highlighting with HighlightCss component and animation-based highlighting with HighlightAnimation. Detail the highlight dimension options and their visual effects. Include practical examples showing different highlighting scenarios, timing configurations, and integration patterns with data manipulation workflows.

wiki_catalogs.name: Virtual Scrolling
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive content for virtual scrolling mechanics in Stk Table Vue. Explain how virtual scrolling optimizes performance by rendering only visible rows/columns instead of the entire dataset. Document the virtual scroll engine including VirtualScrollStore and VirtualScrollXStore data structures, page size calculation, and viewport management. Detail the Y-axis virtual scrolling algorithm for large datasets, including startIndex/endIndex calculation, row height handling, and scroll position tracking. Explain X-axis virtual scrolling for wide tables with column virtualization. Cover auto-row height support, expandable rows, and merge cells scenarios. Include performance benchmarks, configuration options, and best practices for enabling virtual scrolling in different use cases.

wiki_catalogs.name: Huge Data Demonstration
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the huge data demonstration showcasing StkTable's performance capabilities with large datasets. Detail the implementation of virtual scrolling with 100,000+ rows, memory optimization techniques, and rendering performance benchmarks. Document the mock data generation strategy, column configuration for massive datasets, and event handling patterns. Include performance metrics, browser compatibility considerations, and optimization tips for handling large datasets efficiently. Provide step-by-step implementation guide with code examples, configuration options, and best practices for production deployments.

wiki_catalogs.name: Vue 2.7 Compatibility
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive Vue 2.7 compatibility documentation covering migration strategies, compatibility considerations, and implementation differences. Document the dual-framework support architecture, Vue 2.7 specific configuration requirements, and compatibility limitations. Explain component registration patterns, template syntax differences, and prop handling variations between Vue 3 and Vue 2.7. Include step-by-step migration guides, common compatibility issues and solutions, and best practices for maintaining compatibility across both frameworks. Address plugin registration, directive usage, and composition API alternatives where applicable.

wiki_catalogs.name: Vertical Virtual Scrolling
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for vertical virtual scrolling implementation in Stk Table Vue. Explain the algorithm for rendering only visible rows in the viewport, including viewport calculation, row height management, and scroll position tracking. Document configuration options like fixed row heights, minimum/maximum viewport sizes, and performance tuning parameters. Include practical examples showing implementation patterns for large datasets, performance benchmarks compared to standard table rendering, and best practices for optimal user experience. Address common scenarios like dynamic row heights, scroll position restoration, keyboard navigation support, and integration with sorting and filtering features.

wiki_catalogs.name: Row Dragging
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for row dragging functionality in Stk Table Vue. Explain the implementation of draggable rows using the 'dragRow' column type, custom drag handle components, and visual feedback during drag operations. Document the useTrDrag composable function, drag handle positioning, and drop zone validation logic. Include practical examples showing basic row reordering, custom drag handle implementation, and integration with virtual scrolling. Cover event handling for drag start, drag over, drop, and drag end events. Address performance considerations for large datasets, drag conflict resolution with selection systems, and accessibility features for keyboard navigation during drag operations.

wiki_catalogs.name: Theme System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the theme system including light and dark mode implementation. Document CSS custom properties (CSS variables) that control colors, spacing, and visual elements. Explain the dark mode class application (.dark) and how it overrides default color schemes. Cover theme customization through CSS variable overrides, component-level theme switching, and dynamic theme detection. Include practical examples of common theme modifications, color palette customization, and responsive theme behavior. Address browser compatibility considerations and performance implications of theme switching.

wiki_catalogs.name: Vertical Virtual Scrolling
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for vertical virtual scrolling implementation in Stk Table Vue. Explain the VirtualScrollStore data structure including containerHeight, pageSize, startIndex, endIndex, rowHeight, offsetTop, scrollTop, and scrollHeight properties. Document the Y-axis scrolling algorithm that calculates visible row range based on scroll position and container height. Detail the page size calculation logic considering table headers, row heights, and viewport dimensions. Cover the startIndex/endIndex computation methods for both fixed and auto-row height scenarios. Explain the offsetTop calculation for proper table positioning and the scrollHeight management for scrollbars. Include performance optimizations like Vue 2 scroll delay handling and stripe pattern compatibility. Provide configuration examples and best practices for enabling vertical virtual scrolling with large datasets.

wiki_catalogs.name: Getting Started
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive getting started documentation for Stk Table Vue. Include step-by-step installation instructions using npm, basic project setup, and essential configuration. Provide a complete working example showing how to create a basic table with columns and data source. Document the minimum required props (columns, dataSource, rowKey) and explain their purposes. Include Vue 2.7 and Vue 3.x usage patterns with proper ref handling. Demonstrate basic styling options and common configuration scenarios. Address initial troubleshooting and common setup issues. Provide clear progression paths to more advanced features.

wiki_catalogs.name: Column Props
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for StkTableColumn configuration object. Document all column-level properties including dataIndex, title, width, alignment, sorting options, and custom rendering. Cover special column types like seq, expand, dragRow, and tree-node columns. Include comprehensive examples of column configuration for different use cases. Document custom cell rendering props (customCell, customHeaderCell) with component integration patterns. Explain column merging, fixed positioning, and responsive behavior options. Provide TypeScript interface definitions and type safety information for column configurations.

wiki_catalogs.name: Data Display
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for data display features in Stk Table Vue. Document empty state handling including default empty messages, full-page empty states, and custom slot-based empty content. Explain border styling options, size variants (default, flexible), and stripe patterns for improved readability. Cover visual presentation enhancements including alternating row colors, responsive sizing, and border configurations. Include examples of custom empty state implementations and styling variations.

wiki_catalogs.name: Custom Cell Rendering
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for custom cell rendering capabilities in Stk Table Vue. Explain slot-based cell customization, component-based cell rendering, and yield-based cell implementation patterns. Document the cell rendering lifecycle, prop passing mechanisms, and event handling within custom cells. Include comprehensive examples of complex cell types like editable cells, action buttons, progress indicators, and rich content displays. Address performance considerations for custom renderers, memory optimization techniques, and best practices for maintaining smooth scrolling performance with complex cell content.

wiki_catalogs.name: Selection Systems
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for selection systems including row selection, cell selection, and drag selection mechanisms. Document checkbox-based selection with multi-select capabilities and selection state management. Explain drag selection functionality for range selection and mouse interaction patterns. Cover hover-based selection with RowCellHoverSelect component and keyboard navigation support. Detail selection events, selection state persistence, and integration with external selection controls. Include examples of selection customization, programmatic selection manipulation, and accessibility considerations for screen readers and keyboard-only users.

wiki_catalogs.name: Column Management System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the column management system explaining how Stk Table Vue handles dynamic column configurations. Document the StkTableColumn interface, column properties (key, title, width, fixed positions), and column hierarchy for multi-level headers. Explain column fixing mechanisms for left/right positioning, responsive column behavior, and column visibility toggling. Cover column resizing functionality, drag-and-drop reordering, and column merging capabilities. Detail the relationship between tableHeaders and tableHeaderLast arrays, column spanning for merged cells, and how column configurations affect virtual scrolling calculations. Include practical examples of complex column setups and common column management patterns.

wiki_catalogs.name: Matrix Table Examples
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for matrix table implementations demonstrating grid-like data structures and cell-based interactions. Document the MatrixCell component architecture, coordinate-based data mapping, and interactive cell selection patterns. Include examples of dynamic matrix generation, cell state management, and event-driven cell updates. Cover styling approaches for matrix layouts, responsive design considerations, and accessibility features. Provide implementation patterns for custom matrix operations, data validation, and user interaction handling.

wiki_catalogs.name: Build System Configuration
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed build system configuration documentation covering Vite setup, TypeScript compilation, and bundler optimization. Document Vite configuration for library builds, including entry points, output formats, and asset handling. Explain TypeScript configuration for both ESM and CJS modules, declaration file generation, and type checking processes. Cover PostCSS configuration, CSS preprocessing, and style bundling strategies. Include webpack configuration alternatives, Rollup setup for library distribution, and optimization techniques for production builds. Address tree shaking, bundle analysis, and performance optimization strategies.

wiki_catalogs.name: Horizontal Virtual Scrolling
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for horizontal virtual scrolling functionality in Stk Table Vue. Explain the implementation of rendering only visible columns in the viewport, including column width calculation, horizontal scroll position tracking, and viewport boundary management. Document configuration options for column virtualization, minimum column widths, and performance optimization settings. Include practical examples demonstrating implementation for wide datasets with many columns, performance comparisons with standard horizontal scrolling, and best practices for maintaining user experience. Address integration with column resizing, fixed columns, and responsive design considerations.

wiki_catalogs.name: Column Header Dragging
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for column header dragging functionality in Stk Table Vue. Explain the implementation of column reordering through header drag operations, including visual indicators during drag, drop zone validation, and column position updates. Document the useThDrag composable function, drag threshold handling, and column order preservation mechanisms. Include practical examples showing basic column reordering, preventing specific columns from being dragged, and maintaining column configurations during reordering. Cover edge cases such as minimum column visibility requirements, drag direction constraints, and integration with column resizing functionality. Address performance optimization for tables with many columns and responsive design considerations for mobile devices.

wiki_catalogs.name: Scrollbar Styling
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for scrollbar styling and customization. Document the custom scrollbar implementation using CSS pseudo-elements and variables (--sb-width, --sb-height, --sb-thumb-color). Explain cross-browser compatibility approaches, scrollbar positioning, and hover effects. Cover the scrollbar-on class for controlling native vs custom scrollbars. Include practical examples of custom scrollbar themes, sizing adjustments, and responsive scrollbar behavior. Address performance considerations, accessibility requirements, and browser-specific styling differences.

wiki_catalogs.name: Horizontal Virtual Scrolling
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for horizontal virtual scrolling implementation in Stk Table Vue. Explain the VirtualScrollXStore data structure including containerWidth, scrollWidth, startIndex, endIndex, offsetLeft, and scrollLeft properties. Document the X-axis scrolling algorithm that calculates visible columns based on scroll position and container width. Detail the column virtualization logic that handles fixed left/right columns while virtualizing middle columns. Explain the startIndex/endIndex calculation for columns considering fixed column widths and container dimensions. Cover the offsetLeft calculation for proper table positioning and the scrollWidth management for horizontal scrollbars. Include examples of enabling horizontal virtual scrolling for wide tables and performance considerations for large column counts.

wiki_catalogs.name: Core Concepts
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the core concepts section explaining fundamental Stk Table Vue principles. Thoroughly explain virtual scrolling mechanics, how it optimizes performance for large datasets, and when to enable it. Document the column management system, data binding patterns, and the relationship between props, events, and slots. wiki_catalogs.name: Events
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive event documentation for StkTable component. Document all emitted events with their parameters, callback signatures, and usage scenarios. Cover user interaction events like row-click, cell-click, sort-change, and selection-changed. Include data manipulation events such as row-expand, row-collapse, and drag-drop events. Include event timing, propagation behavior, and integration with parent components. Document event-driven data flow and state management patterns.

wiki_catalogs.name: Row Behavior
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for row behavior features in Stk Table Vue. wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed content explaining Stk Table Vue's data binding patterns and reactive architecture. Document the dataSource prop structure, row key generation strategies, and data transformation processes. Cover data immutability patterns, shallow reactive references for performance, and how changes propagate through the component tree. Detail the relationship between data sources and virtual scrolling calculations, including data copying strategies and reference management. Include examples of different data binding approaches, performance implications of various data structures, and best practices for large dataset handling.

wiki_catalogs.name: Tree Panel Implementations

wiki_catalogs.name: TypeScript Integration
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive TypeScript integration documentation covering type definitions, interface implementations, and generic type usage. wiki_catalogs.name: Auto-Height Virtual Scrolling
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for auto-height virtual scrolling in Stk Table Vue. wiki_catalogs.name: Examples and Showcase
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content showcasing practical implementation examples and real-world use cases. Document the huge data demonstration with performance benchmarks and optimization techniques. Include matrix table examples, panel tree implementations, and virtual list patterns. Cover cell editing scenarios, interactive data manipulation, and dynamic column management. Provide complete working examples with downloadable code, live demos, and step-by-step implementation guides. Include integration patterns with external APIs, state management systems, and backend services.

wiki_catalogs.name: Migration and Updates
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive migration and update documentation covering version upgrades and breaking changes. Document migration paths from older versions, deprecated feature handling, and compatibility considerations. Explain semantic versioning approach, breaking change identification, and upgrade strategies. Include automated migration tools, codemod scripts, and manual update procedures. Cover legacy component compatibility, gradual migration approaches, and rollback strategies. Address common migration issues and their solutions with practical examples.

wiki_catalogs.name: Troubleshooting and FAQ
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop comprehensive troubleshooting documentation addressing common issues and frequently asked questions. Document performance problems, rendering issues, and compatibility challenges with their solutions. Include debugging techniques, development tools usage, and diagnostic approaches. Cover browser compatibility issues, Vue version conflicts, and build system problems. Provide systematic problem-solving methodologies, error message interpretations, and preventive measures. Address community-reported issues and their resolutions with step-by-step fix procedures.

wiki_items.title: Tree Data Structures and Hierarchical Display

wiki_overview.content:
Based on my analysis of the stk-table-vue project, I can now generate a comprehensive overview:

<blog>

# Stk Table Vue - High Performance Virtual Table Component

## Project Introduction

**Stk Table Vue** is a high-performance virtual table component designed for Vue 3 and Vue 2.7 applications. The project focuses on delivering real-time data visualization with exceptional performance for large datasets through intelligent virtual scrolling techniques.

### Core Goals and Objectives

- **Performance Optimization**: Deliver smooth scrolling experiences for large datasets using virtual scrolling
- **Real-time Data Handling**: Optimize rendering for dynamic, frequently updated data sources
- **Cross-Vue Compatibility**: Support both Vue 3 and Vue 2.7 with consistent APIs
- **Developer Experience**: Provide intuitive configuration while maintaining high performance

### Target Audience

- Frontend developers building data-intensive applications
- Teams requiring real-time data visualization
- Applications handling large datasets with frequent updates
- Projects needing high-performance table components

## Technical Architecture

The project follows a modular architecture built around Vue 3 Composition API with TypeScript support:

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[StkTable.vue] --> B[Core Virtual Scrolling]
    A --> C[Column Management]
    A --> D[Event Handling]
    A --> E[Theme System]
    
    B --> F[useVirtualScroll]
    B --> G[useScrollRowByRow]
    B --> H[useAutoResize]
    
    C --> I[useFixedCol]
    C --> J[useMergeCells]
    C --> K[useColResize]
    
    D --> L[useCellSelection]
    D --> M[useRowExpand]
    D --> N[useTree]
    
    E --> O[useFixedStyle]
    E --> P[useHighlight]
```

### Component Breakdown

The main component (`StkTable.vue`) serves as the central orchestrator, delegating specific functionalities to specialized composable functions:

- **Virtual Scrolling Engine**: Handles both vertical and horizontal virtualization
- **Column Management**: Manages column configurations, resizing, and fixed columns
- **Event System**: Processes user interactions and emits appropriate events
- **Theme & Styling**: Provides flexible theming and styling options

### Design Patterns

The project implements several key design patterns:

1. **Composition API Pattern**: Uses Vue 3 Composition API for better code organization
2. **Hook Pattern**: Modular functionality encapsulated in composable functions
3. **Configuration Pattern**: Extensive props-based configuration system
4. **Event-Driven Architecture**: Comprehensive event emission for component interaction

## Key Implementation

### Main Entry Points

- **Primary Component**: `src/StkTable/StkTable.vue` - Core table implementation
- **Export Module**: `src/StkTable/index.ts` - Public API exports
- **Build Configuration**: `vite.config.ts` - Library build setup

### Core Modules

#### Virtual Scrolling System
- **Location**: `src/StkTable/useVirtualScroll.ts`
- **Functionality**: Implements both vertical and horizontal virtual scrolling
- **Features**: Dynamic page size calculation, auto row height support, expandable rows

#### Tree Data Management
- **Location**: `src/StkTable/useTree.ts`
- **Functionality**: Handles hierarchical data structures with expand/collapse operations
- **Features**: Default expansion policies, recursive flattening, state persistence

#### Column Operations
- **Location**: `src/StkTable/useColResize.ts`
- **Functionality**: Manages column resizing with drag handles
- **Features**: Min/max width constraints, responsive updates

### Configuration Approach

The project uses a comprehensive props-based configuration system:

```mermaid
classDiagram
    class StkTableProps {
        +columns: StkTableColumn[]
        +dataSource: any[]
        +virtual: boolean
        +virtualX: boolean
        +rowKey: string
        +theme: 'light'|'dark'
        +stripe: boolean
        +scrollbar: boolean|ScrollbarOptions
    }
    
    class StkTableColumn {
        +dataIndex: string
        +title: string
        +type: 'seq'|'expand'|'dragRow'|'tree-node'
        +width: string|number
        +fixed: 'left'|'right'|null
        +customCell: Component
    }
    
    StkTableProps --> StkTableColumn
```

### External Dependencies

**Development Dependencies:**
- Vue 3.5.22 (core framework)
- TypeScript 5.8.3 (type safety)
- Vite 7.2.2 (build tool)
- Less 4.2.0 (styling)
- Vitest 3.2.4 (testing)

**Runtime Dependencies:**
- Vue runtime (externalized)
- Minimal third-party dependencies

### Integration Points

The component integrates seamlessly with existing Vue applications:

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant App as Vue Application
    participant StkTable as StkTable Component
    participant Utils as Utility Functions
    participant Events as Event System
    
    App->>StkTable: Render with props
    StkTable->>Utils: Initialize virtual scroll
    Utils->>Events: Setup event listeners
    Events->>App: Emit table events
    App->>StkTable: Handle user interactions
```

## Key Features

### Functionality Overview

1. **High-Performance Virtual Scrolling**
   - Supports both vertical and horizontal virtualization
   - Optimized for large datasets with thousands of rows
   - Automatic page size calculation based on container height

2. **Advanced Column Management**
   - Configurable column widths and fixed positions
   - Custom cell rendering with slot-based components
   - Column resizing with drag handles
   - Multi-level header support

3. **Rich Interaction Capabilities**
   - Row and cell selection with keyboard navigation
   - Drag-and-drop row reordering
   - Expandable rows with custom content
   - Tree data structure support

4. **Flexible Theming System**
   - Light and dark themes
   - Customizable styling options
   - CSS variable-based theming

### Implementation Highlights

#### Virtual Scrolling Architecture
- **Location**: `src/StkTable/useVirtualScroll.ts`
- **Performance**: Maintains only visible rows in DOM
- **Memory Efficiency**: Reduces memory footprint for large datasets

#### Tree Data Visualization
- **Location**: `src/StkTable/useTree.ts`
- **Features**: Recursive data flattening, expand/collapse state management
- **Integration**: Seamless with virtual scrolling

#### Advanced Cell Rendering
- **Location**: `src/StkTable/components/`
- **Components**: Custom cell rendering with slot-based architecture
- **Flexibility**: Supports complex cell content and interactions

### Feature Architecture

```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Initialized
    Initialized --> VirtualScrollDisabled: virtual=false
    Initialized --> VirtualScrollEnabled: virtual=true
    
    VirtualScrollEnabled --> HorizontalVirtualScroll: virtualX=true
    VirtualScrollEnabled --> VerticalVirtualScroll: virtualX=false
    
    HorizontalVirtualScroll --> ColumnResizing: colResizable=true
    VerticalVirtualScroll --> RowSelection: cellSelection=true
    
    ColumnResizing --> FixedColumns: fixed='left'|'right'
    RowSelection --> TreeOperations: treeConfig provided
    
    FixedColumns --> [*]
    TreeOperations --> [*]
```

The Stk Table Vue project represents a mature, performance-focused solution for Vue applications requiring high-performance table components. Its modular architecture, comprehensive feature set, and attention to performance optimization make it suitable for demanding real-time data visualization scenarios.

**Sources:**
- [package.json](package.json)
- [StkTable.vue](src/StkTable/StkTable.vue)
- [index.ts](src/StkTable/index.ts)
- [types/index.ts](src/StkTable/types/index.ts)
- [vite.config.ts](vite.config.ts)
- [useVirtualScroll.ts](src/StkTable/useVirtualScroll.ts)
- [useTree.ts](src/StkTable/useTree.ts)
- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md)

</blog>
